assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 extracts the Upstream Affected Component (webpack) from customfield_10632 and uses it to search for related CVE Jiras (§1.59)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md line 20 explicitly extracts 'Upstream Affected Component (customfield_10632) | webpack'. overlap-check.md line 7 confirms the prerequisite check: 'Upstream Affected Component (customfield_10632): webpack -- present'. The JQL search on line 17-18 uses 'cf[10632] ~ "webpack"' to search for related Vulnerability issues, returning TC-8012.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 filters search results by matching PS Component (customfield_10669 = pscomponent:org/rhtpa-ui) and Stream (customfield_10832 = rhtpa-2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md lines 8-9 verify prerequisites: 'PS Component (customfield_10669): pscomponent:org/rhtpa-ui -- present' and 'Stream (customfield_10832): rhtpa-2.2 -- present'. The results table (line 25) shows PS Component and Stream columns for TC-8012. Line 27 explicitly states: 'Match found: TC-8012 shares the same upstream component (webpack), PS Component (pscomponent:org/rhtpa-ui), and Stream (rhtpa-2.2).'

assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 traverses issuelinks on TC-8012 to find remediation task TC-8013 via the 'Depend' link type
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md line 31 states: 'Traversing issue links of TC-8012 to find linked remediation Tasks (link type "Depend"):' followed by a table (lines 33-35) showing TC-8013 with summary 'Bump webpack to 5.96.1 in rhtpa-ui [rhtpa-2.2]' and dependency bump 'webpack 5.95.0 -> 5.96.1'.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 compares the remediation task's bump version (5.96.1) against the current CVE's fix threshold (5.98.0) and determines the fix does NOT cover this CVE
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md lines 39-43 show the Coverage Comparison: 'Current CVE fix threshold | >= 5.98.0', 'Existing remediation target version (TC-8013) | 5.96.1', 'Covers current CVE? | No -- 5.96.1 < 5.98.0'. Line 45 elaborates: 'the current CVE-2026-45678 requires webpack >= 5.98.0. Since 5.96.1 is below the 5.98.0 fix threshold, the existing remediation does not cover this CVE.'

assertion_results.text: The overlap table is presented to the engineer showing TC-8012 and TC-8013 with 'Covers This CVE? = No' — the triage proceeds to create new remediation tasks rather than recommending closure
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md lines 48-51 present the 'Cross-CVE Overlap Summary Table' with columns: Related CVE Jira (TC-8012), Remediation Task (TC-8013 webpack -> 5.96.1), Current Fix Threshold (5.98.0), Covered? (No). triage-outcome.md line 3 states decision: 'Affected -- New Remediation Required'. Lines 23-27 detail creating new upstream remediation task (bump webpack to >= 5.98.0) and downstream propagation subtask, not recommending closure.
